name: design-ai-ux
description: DESIGN-AI-UX — Camadas 4-6 do Design Skills Pack (curadoria novitckii.com, skills Owl-Listener/ai-design-skills): 21 skills pra desenhar produtos de IA, prompts e confiança. Interação com IA (8): context-window-design, conversation-patterns, generative-ui, progressive-disclosure, multimodal-orchestration, mixed-initiative-flow, frustration-detection, feedback-loops. Arquitetura de prompt (7): system-prompt-structure, template-design, few-shot-patterns, chain-of-thought-design, constraint-specification, context-engineering, prompt-versioning. Comportamento (3): persona-architecture, tone-calibration, emotional-design. Confiança e segurança (3): guardrail-design, trust-calibration, transparency-patterns. Use SEMPRE pra: 'desenhar produto de IA', 'UX de chatbot', 'system prompt', 'arquitetura de prompt', 'persona do agente', 'tom do agente', 'guardrails', 'confiança do usuário', 'criar skill', 'melhorar prompt', 'few-shot', 'chain of thought', 'UI generativa', 'fluxo conversacional', 'design de agente'. Orquestrado por zeus-design. Complementa zeus-co-labs (prompt-architect) e zeus-co-factory (LEPs).
